titlestmt.titleproper: Preliminary Guide to the Arnold Saks Associates Records
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Melissa Quinones and Arts Library Special Collections staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday June 18, 2026 at 19:00
Word doc transformed and imported by Tyler Wade; front matter updated to more current standards by Adrienne Pruitt.

corpname.part: Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library Special Collections

did.abstract: The Arnold Saks Associates records consist primarily of completed graphic design work for a variety of companies, and also some production materials.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Arnold Saks (Yale MFA '55) is a prominent New York City based graphic designer. His firm, Arnold Saks Associates, was one of the major firms to design high production value annual reports in the 1980s and 1990s, the heyday of this style of publication. The firm also designed corporate identities.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Arnold Saks Associates records contain completed graphic design work. The bulk of the collection is printed material, mockups, and final work produced for various corporate and institutional clients, including Goldman Sachs, Alcoa, the Metropolitan Museum, and others. There is a small amount of research material. The collection also includes process material for the Runner's Map of New York Central Park.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: In order by client, then by project and/or date. Maintains original arrangement of filing systems at Arnold Saks Associates.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Arnold Saks Associates Records, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: For location code "O," please refer to the Oversize listing at the end of the finding aid.
